name: ARVANA INC
summary: PART I As used herein the terms Arvana, we, our, and us refer to Arvana Inc., its subsidiary, and its predecessor, unless context indicates otherwise. Any distinct references to Down2Fish refer to Down 2 Fish Charters, LLC., a wholly owned subsidiary of Arvana.
